1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

1.description: resolve Trondheim municipality geometry and identifiers

2.description: inspect distinct risk class values to identify high risk class

3.description: filter quick-clay hazard areas by high risk class and Trondheim municipality extent

4.description: filter parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m²

5.description: identify parcels intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: ensure one row per parcel and retain largest area

9.description: join municipality and county names for final reporting
